mapper.select:
SELECT AUTHOR_CODE as authorCode, AUTHOR_NM as authorNm, AUTHOR_DC as authorDc, AUTHOR_CREAT_DE as authorCreatDe FROM LETTNAUTHORINFO WHERE 1=1 AND AUTHOR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%' , #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY AUTHOR_CREAT_DE DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM LETTNAUTHORINFO WHERE 1=1 AND AUTHOR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%' , #{searchKeyword}, '%')
SELECT AUTHOR_CODE as authorCode, AUTHOR_NM as authorNm, AUTHOR_DC as authorDc, AUTHOR_CREAT_DE as authorCreatDe FROM LETTNAUTHORINFO
